soc2.label: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.description: Trust Services Criteria–aligned evidence review (Security, Availability, Confidentiality, Processing Integrity, Privacy as applicable).

iso27001.label: ISO/IEC 27001
iso27001.description: Annex A control themes and ISMS evidence review aligned to ISO 27001 security management practices.

tprm.label: General TPRM
tprm.description: Vendor third-party risk review using SOC 2 and ISO 27001 principles without a single certification lens.
